case_title: WESLEY CLARK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-26-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MCINTYRE, MICHAEL ALEXANDER DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-14-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-30-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-14-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-26-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
